latestHandover: Session 15: Integrated K3s storage redundancy findings. Added finding STORE-02 (Critical) for lack of persistent storage redundancy across hosts. Created Phase 9 Group (High-Availability Storage). Proposed Longhorn implementation with Azure storage backup target. Added receptor-backups/longhorn-backups container to Terraform. 18 open tasks remain.

sessionHistory.summary: Initial audit. 7 findings from receptor-infra repo inspection. Feature branch created, audit.md and recommendations.json written.
Enriched with live az CLI data. Added SEC-01 (KV network ACLs) and SEC-02 (SP client secret). Confirmed all resource identifiers. 3 ARM template discrepancies found. SEC-02 upgraded to Critical.

Iterative improvement round 1. Read values/vault.yaml — AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET in vault-azure-kms k8s Secret (not plaintext). Added STORE-01 (no VSO sync), SEC-03 (key rotation), SEC-04 (shared key access). Set Supabase review_due_date 2026-06-16. 12 findings.

Expanded scope to supabase-kubernetes. Read helmfile.yaml (supabase/supabase v0.5.1 for prod+staging). Found KUBE-01 (critical — unresolved ${} placeholders in prod values), KUBE-02 (no resource limits), ENV-01 (no test environment), KUBE-03 (no pod security contexts), KUBE-04 (Falco disabled). 17 findings total. 6-phase implementation plan.

Iterative improvement round 2. Read supabase-receptor k3s/ directory. Found ARCH-01 (k3s/values/ missing — helmfile unapply-able), NET-01 (Vault namespace DNS-only egress blocks Azure KV auto-unseal), SPLIT-01 (two-repo helmfile split, no apply order), CI-03 (staging-smoke.yml broken on GitHub-hosted runners per own comment), RBAC-01 (ci-namespace-manager wildcard verbs, no Kyverno enforcement). 22 proposed findings. Phase 7 added.
Round 3 lifecycle audit. Read all 5 app repo CI workflows. Found LIFE-01 through LIFE-07. Also graduated ARCH-01/NET-01/SPLIT-01/CI-03/RBAC-01 from proposed to open. 29 findings total. Phase 8 added.

ADR decisions clarified by human: frontend deployment = k3s containerised (not Cloudflare Pages), match-backend = always-on HTTP service (future webhook trigger). Updated LIFE-01 and LIFE-02 task descriptions.

Implementation session 1. Graduated LIFE-01 through LIFE-07 from proposed to open. Implemented Phase 1 (SEC-02, STORE-01, CI-02): created terraform/modules/azure-workload-identity/ (WIF Terraform module), patched values/vault.yaml removing AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET, updated docs/security/vault-configuration.md with receptor-infra-tf-ci JWT role and azure-terraform KV path. receptor-infra audit branch created and pushed.

Implementation session 2. Implemented Phase 2 (IAC-01, IAC-03): created terraform root files (providers.tf, backend.tf, variables.tf, outputs.tf, main.tf), modules/key-vault/ (K3sUnlock KV + vault-unseal RSA key + 3 access policies), modules/backup-storage/ (k3sbackups71a475f1dae6 RAGRS + receptor-backups container), and BOOTSTRAP.md (bootstrap steps, import commands, plan verification table). IAC-03-T1 resolved as part of IAC-01-T3. receptor-infra pushed commit 34ac5cc.

Implementation session 3. Implemented Phase 3 (CI-01, IAC-02): created terraform-plan.yml (PR trigger, OIDC→Vault→Azure WIF, posts plan as PR comment) and terraform-apply.yml (push-to-main, auto-approve, Slack on failure). Deleted azure/ ARM template directory (IAC-02-T1). ARM-01-T1 closed as part of IAC-02-T1. Added .gitignore and .terraform.lock.hcl. Updated README.md with terraform/ layout and Terraform CI section. receptor-infra pushed commit 53ee0b2.

Phase 4 (SEC-04) and Phase 5 (SEC-03, IAC-04) complete. STORE-01-T2 closed (WIF no-op). SEC-04-T1 closed (use_azuread_auth already set). SEC-03-T1: rotation_policy P180D added to key-vault/main.tf. IAC-04-T1: terraform-drift.yml created (weekly, opens GitHub Issue on drift). SEC-01-T1 BLOCKED: dynamic Hyper-V egress IP. Documented in code.

Operational cluster session — no formal audit tasks completed. Fixed cluster-sync helmfile workflow (vault CLI → curl, PR #1 merged). Resolved stuck Helm releases (cert-manager, kube-prometheus-stack, vault). All 7 ARC runner listeners operational. Expanded cluster: receptor-ctrl-10 (HA control-plane, 10.10.0.10) and receptor-work-10 (worker, 10.10.0.20) joined on HYPERV-2. Fixed work-01 kernel (generic → linux-azure). Cleaned 15 ghost Unknown pods. Documented cluster infrastructure in doco-common-bond.

Phase 6 partial (KUBE-01, KUBE-02). Committed side-session changes across 3 repos (SSH CIDR fix, 3-node CP docs, vm-provisioning skill). Created VSO secret injection for Supabase (VaultAuth CRDs, VaultStaticSecret CRDs for prod+staging, secretRef values.yaml). Added resource limits for all 12 Supabase components in prod (full) and staging (~50%). All ${} placeholders removed from values.yaml.

Vault kubernetes auth restoration + NET-01. Diagnosed two root causes for VSO 403 errors: (a) allow-vault-egress NetworkPolicy excluded 10.0.0.0/8, blocking TokenReview to k8s API; (b) stale token_reviewer_jwt from Raft restore. Fixed NetworkPolicy (added 10.43.0.1/32:443 + 10.10.0.0/24:6443 egress rules). Cleared token_reviewer_jwt. VSO now syncs supabase-credentials (12 keys) in both namespaces. Updated vault-configuration.md with Supabase secret paths, k8s auth config, NetworkPolicy requirement, Raft restore caveat.

Integrated K3s storage redundancy findings from separate research session. Added STORE-02 (Lack of Persistent Storage Redundancy) and Phase 9 (High-Availability Storage). Added 'longhorn-backups' container to Azure Terraform (modules/backup-storage). Defined Longhorn implementation plan and tasks. openTaskCount updated to 18.
